title: Spider-Man
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 17 wins & 65 nominations total
plot: Based on Marvel Comics' superhero character, this is a story of Peter Parker who is a nerdy high-schooler. He was orphaned as a child, bullied by jocks, and can't confess his crush for his stunning neighborhood girl Mary Jane Watson. A runaway radioactive spider bites him and his life changes forever — he acquires superhuman powers and must rise to face the eccentric millionaire Norman Osborn, whose maniacal alter ego the Green Goblin threatens everything Peter holds dear.

title: Spider-Man 2
plot: Peter Parker's life is falling apart — his grades slip, he loses jobs, and the girl he loves is engaged to someone else. He gives up being Spider-Man entirely. But when brilliant scientist Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into the villainous Doctor Octopus after a fusion experiment gone wrong, Peter must decide if he can abandon his responsibility to the city he loves.

title: Spider-Man 3
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award. 4 wins & 44 nominations total
plot: Peter Parker has finally balanced his life — until old friend Harry Osbourne seeks revenge as the New Goblin, Uncle Ben's real killer Flint Marko transforms into Sandman, and a mysterious black symbiote bonds with Peter's suit. Amplifying his powers but corrupting his soul, the alien costume forces Peter to confront the darkness within himself.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man
plot: Peter Parker, an outcast high-schooler abandoned by his parents as a child, begins a quest to understand his past — leading him to Oscorp and the lab of Dr. Curt Connors. Along the way he finds his first love in Gwen Stacy and discovers that his destiny as Spider-Man will put him on a collision course with Connors' monstrous alter ego, The Lizard.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
plot: Peter Parker discovers his greatest battle is about to begin. With the emergence of the powerful Electro and the return of his old friend Harry Osborn, Peter realizes all his enemies share one connection — Oscorp. As he struggles to balance his life with Gwen Stacy against his duties as Spider-Man, Peter faces consequences that will change his world forever.

title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
plot: Thrilled by his experience with the Avengers, a young Peter Parker navigates his new identity as Spider-Man under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark. Eager to prove himself as more than just a friendly neighborhood hero, Peter's ambitions collide with a dangerous new threat when the weapons-dealing Vulture emerges and puts everything Peter holds dear at risk.

title: Spider-Man: Far from Home
plot: Peter Parker joins his friends on a European vacation, hoping to leave super heroics behind. But when Nick Fury recruits him to help investigate a series of elemental creature attacks, Peter must confront illusions, deception, and a far more dangerous enemy — one who knows exactly who he is beneath the mask.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
actor: Tom Holland, Tobey Maguire, Andrew Garfield
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 35 wins & 72 nominations total
plot: Peter Parker's secret identity is revealed to the entire world. Desperate for help, Peter turns to Doctor Strange to make the world forget he is Spider-Man — but the spell goes horribly wrong, shattering the multiverse and bringing in villains and allies from other dimensions, including two other versions of Peter Parker himself.
